channel.title: Dropout.tv - Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout.tv: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party

item.title: Hotties and Hot Hearts - Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
item.description:
The cast reflect on their final battle and the future of their characters.

Duration: 16:54

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, tabletop rpg, RPG, role playing, game masters, commentary, behind the scenes, q and a, Titan Takedown, xavier woods, austin creed, kofi kingston, bayley, chelsea green, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: A Cheeseburger Intimidation Check - Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
item.description:
The cast talk about secrets revealed, deceptions discovered, and the power of house cats.

Duration: 14:44

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, tabletop rpg, RPG, role playing, game masters, commentary, behind the scenes, q and a, Titan Takedown, xavier woods, austin creed, kofi kingston, bayley, chelsea green, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: A Dry January Rube Goldberg Machine - Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
item.description:
The cast discuss winning over the people, the logistics of mini merchandising and art imitating art.

Duration: 11:39

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, tabletop rpg, RPG, role playing, game masters, commentary, behind the scenes, q and a, Titan Takedown, xavier woods, austin creed, kofi kingston, bayley, chelsea green, brennan lee mulligan
